textByHash.a65b904505d27df9095e9a9e0f361b1b0f5bf78c: Hi. The king said that you need to leave?
textByHash.15f6d3714d38b45f71c38fdf4244f9300aee3b6f: I find that hard to believe. I have lots of human friends.
textByHash.abb37f6e3063c2b15964f12b5693222e4f255f1c: Okay, you're the boss! Hold on tight, it'll be a rough ride.
textByHash.79d765fcf011f9dd4098d23704f09fdd8abb3e50: Okay. I'll be here for when you're ready.
textByHash.8bca6e54ed5eceb8e7fea5c7f17dc54686591b2a: That turbulence over the Karamja Volcano was a bit unexpected, and the area round here isn't well suited for emergency landing.
textByHash.bcbf2023427b326ae3f6c04343b92b32f3c720c1: Still! we're still alive that's the main thing. Are you okay?
textByHash.39b697c187ea0a06940a90cbcee01c6e9810847c: I don't think I can fix this. Looks like we'll be heading back by foot. I might see if I can find Penwie while I'm here, I believe he's charting the area.
textByHash.a1c99199f03a3b30774031d6621c40570f2ce1e0: I think I saw some buildings on the coast east of here while we were crashing. I'd have a look there.
textByHash.f34211ab44280fce89c1e8e4ac7af227ea44df1d: It's east of here. I thought I saw some buildings on the coast while we were crashing...
textByHash.914d8a69564573197b631ae6365226a1bb3f561d: Gnome Air is the finest airline in Gielinor!
textByHash.87e27bfa2170d19354af5a1d5b9f8b8c79a03636: Well...it's the only real airline in Gielinor.
textByHash.bc3a099725822c0ae5865e7a0076ddca5d4be036: Well there's a dodgy magic carpet operation in the desert, I doubt it will ever take off... Ha!
textByHash.0757989559b01fb30c2c77756dc4ad248ddbdda8: Glough has ordered that I only take gnomes on Gnome Air.
textByHash.d61c92b63ccccff60fe334fb5ae82c66b493b113: I would, but Glough has told me not to take humans on Gnome Air.
textByHash.2894fc67a0b16bb9c889fca4de0925552bc476f6: Oh we have a whole network! It's wonderful for getting to hard to reach places.
textByHash.1b4be51dc9c4b6c853701b95e390090dafeea7e8: There are so many places where your teleports cannot reach!
textByHash.1928d5e39b9cd3b5a191444e707e30c0183758a4: I think you'll find that is a gnome trade secret!
textByHash.571f717ef7cdf5050707cc0311b2c56ef25a2bf8: I don't think I can fix this. Looks like I'll be heading back by foot.
textByHash.3a91475f7e87ef1c9212ab843dff4be7274ed6f3: A bit of a technical hitch with the landing gear. I won't be able to fly you anywhere, sorry.
